name: Free Anime Hair — Low Poly (800 faces)
description:
Free to download, no strings attached.
Anime-style hair, 800 faces — kept it low poly so it's game-ready and easy to work with. Good for mobile or any project where poly count matters.
Feedback welcome, still improving!
